name: Westridge Cross Academy (Furry High School)
description:
𝓦𝓮𝓵𝓬𝓸𝓶𝓮 𝓽𝓸 𝓦𝓮𝓼𝓽𝓻𝓲𝓭𝓰𝓮 𝓒𝓻𝓸𝓼𝓼 𝓐𝓬𝓪𝓭𝓮𝓶𝔂

where the lockers hum with drama, the courtyard hides secrets, and everyone wants something from you…

✧

━━━━━━━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━━━━━━━

A prestige school where glass-walled labs collide with graffiti-tagged study nooks. A melting pot of humans and anthros—foxes with sharper tongues than claws, wolves who sketch their crushes in the margins, rabbits who run clubs and chaos. Here, academic rivalry is a bloodsport, loyalty is currency, and your next misstep could land you on the homecoming court… or in the rumor mill.

Your story starts now.

❀ Who’s already watching? ❀

━━━━━━━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━━━━━━━
creator: OrigamiGarbageMan
